primary_text:
"I thought it was too good to be true. $50/month for unlimited vet visits? There has to be a catch."

There is not. Best for Pet is a wellness plan, not insurance. No claims. No excess. No pre-existing condition exclusions.

Here is what you actually get: unlimited consults ($0 each), all vaccinations, $250 off dental, annual blood and urine tests, and 24/7 VetChat.

Members save $800 to $1,300 a year.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: Too good to be true? Here is the catch.
description: Save $800 to $1,300/yr. Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental. Cancel anytime.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Quote card format. Disbelief headline, then proof. Clean, trustworthy design.
